en.hero_title: Smart Farming Advice for Nigerian Farmers
en.hero_subtitle: Get localized AI crop recommendations, smart planting calendars, and real-time weather alerts delivered in your preferred language.
en.section_weather_desc: Stay ahead of climate shifts with real-time weather alerts and seasonal notifications for your farm.
en.section_crop_desc: Select your state and farming season to find the most profitable and high-yielding crops suited for your soil.
en.section_calendar_desc: Find the optimal window to sow your seeds based on historical data and real-time climate forecasts.
en.section_yield_desc: Estimate your harvest output in bags (50kg) based on farm size and crop type under standard practices.
en.section_soil_desc: Input basic soil observations to receive low-cost, organic soil restoration practices.
en.section_prices_desc: Native agricultural market prices scraped directly from regional centers to help you sell at the best value.
en.section_ussd_desc: Millions of smallholder farmers use basic feature phones. Test how they interact with Seedorra using offline USSD codes and SMS alerts.
en.ussd_dial_inst: Dial the Seedorra USSD code below to launch the offline menu on the simulator screen:
en.admin_desc: Modify website copy, adjust parameters, and upload media files below.
en.admin_upload_inst: Upload a new image from your computer to replace current assets:

yo.hero_title: Imọran Àgbà Kíkún fún Àwọn Àgbẹ̀ Nàìjíríà
yo.hero_subtitle: Gba awọn iṣeduro irugbin ti o ni agbara AI, awọn akoko gbingbin to dara julọ, ati awọn ikilo oju-ọjọ ni ede rẹ.
yo.section_weather_desc: Duro niwaju awọn iyipada oju-ọjọ pẹlu awọn ikilo oju-ọjọ akoko-gidi fun oko rẹ.
yo.label_status_good: Ipo ti o dara fun gbingbin
yo.section_crop_desc: Yan ipinlẹ rẹ ati akoko gbingbin lati wa awọn irugbin to dara julọ fun ile rẹ.
yo.text_recommended_crops: Awọn irugbin ti a ṣeduro fun ọ
yo.section_calendar_desc: Wa akoko to dara julọ lati gbin awọn irugbin rẹ ti o da lori oju-ọjọ ati awọn asọtẹlẹ.
yo.section_yield_desc: Ṣe iṣiro iye apo (50kg) ti iwọ yoo kórè ti o da lori iwọn ilẹ oko rẹ.
yo.section_soil_desc: Dahun awọn ibeere ti o rọrun lori ile rẹ lati gba awọn iṣe to dara julọ ti ko gbowolori.
yo.section_prices_desc: Awọn idiyele ọja gidi ti a mu jade lati awọn ọja agbegbe lati ran ọ lọwọ lati ta daradara.
yo.section_ussd_desc: Ọpọlọpọ awọn àgbẹ̀ lo foonu kekere. Dán bi wọ́n ṣe n ba Seedorra sọrọ wò pẹlu USSD ati SMS lori foonu simulator yii.
yo.ussd_dial_inst: Tẹ bọtini lati tẹ koodu USSD Seedorra lati bẹrẹ eto simulator foonu:
yo.admin_desc: Ṣatunṣe awọn ọrọ oju-iwe ati gbe faili media si ori oko rẹ.
yo.admin_upload_inst: Gbe aworan tuntun lati kọnputa rẹ:

ha.hero_title: Hanyoyin Noma na Zamani don Manoman Najeriya
ha.hero_subtitle: Sami shawarwarin amfanin gona da AI ke bayarwa, jadawalin shuka, da sanarwar yanayi a yarenka.
ha.section_weather_desc: Sami sanarwar canjin yanayi a ainihin lokaci don kiyaye gonarku.
ha.section_crop_desc: Zaɓi jihar ku da lokacin noma don gano amfanin gona da ya fi dacewa da gonar ku.
ha.text_recommended_crops: Amfanin gona da aka ba ku shawara
ha.section_calendar_desc: Gano mafi kyawun lokacin shuka iri dangane da tarihin yanayi da hasashen yanzu.
ha.section_yield_desc: Kiyasta yawan buhunan (50kg) da zaku kalla dangane da girman gonarku.
ha.section_soil_desc: Amsa tambayoyi masu sauƙi game da ƙasarku don samun dabarun gyara ƙasa marasa tsada.
ha.opt_clayey: Yumbu (Yana da danko, yana riƙe ruwa)
ha.opt_sandy: Yashi (Ba shi da danko, yana tsotse ruwa)
ha.opt_dark: Baki ko Kasa-kasa (Yana da kyau sosai)
ha.opt_reddish: Ja ko Rawaya (Karfe ya fi yawa)
ha.opt_light: Fari ko Toka (Ba shi da albarka sosai)
ha.section_prices_desc: Farashin kaya a kasuwannin Najeriya don taimaka muku samun riba mai kyau.
ha.section_ussd_desc: Manoma da yawa suna amfani da wayar mulki. Gwada yadda suke magana da Seedorra ta USSD da SMS a wannan wayar gwajin.
ha.ussd_dial_inst: Latsa lambobin USSD don shiga cikin tsarin wayar gwaji:
ha.admin_desc: Gyara rubutun shafin ko tura hotuna a wannan shafin.

ig.hero_title: Ndụmọdụ Ọrụ Ugbo Mara Mma maka Ndị Ọrụ Ugbo Nigeria
ig.hero_subtitle: Nweta ndụmọdụ ihe ọkụkụ sitere na AI, oge kacha mma ịkụ ihe, na ịdọ aka ná ntị ihu igwe n'asụsụ gị.
ig.section_weather_title: Ịdọ Aka Ná Ntị Ihu Igwe
ig.section_weather_desc: Nọrọ na nche pụọ na mgbanwe ihu igwe site na ịdọ aka ná ntị ihu igwe n'oge kwesịrị ekwesị.
ig.label_status_good: Ihu igwe dị mma maka ịkụ ihe
ig.section_crop_desc: Họrọ steeti gị na oge ịkụ ihe ka ị chọta ihe ọkụkụ kacha enye uru maka ala gị.
ig.text_recommended_crops: Ihe ọkụkụ anyị tụrụ aro maka gị
ig.section_calendar_desc: Chọta oge kacha mma ịgha mkpụrụ gị dabere na data ihu igwe na amụma ugbu a.
ig.btn_get_calendar: Nweta Oge Ịkụ Ihe Kacha Mma
ig.text_planting_window: Oge Ịkụ Ihe A Tụrụ Aro
ig.section_yield_desc: Gbakọọ ihe ọkụkụ ị ga-enweta na puku akpa (50kg) dabere na nha ala ugbo gị.
ig.text_expected_yield: Ihe Ọkụkụ A Tụrụ Anya Ya
ig.section_soil_desc: Zaa ajụjụ ndị dị mfe gbasara ala gị ka ị nweta ndụmọdụ iji mee ka ala gị dị mma.
ig.opt_sandy: Ala Àjá (Na-adịghị anya, mmiri na-agbapụta ngwa ngwa)
ig.opt_dark: Oji ma ọ bụ Nchara-nchara (Na-eme nri nke ukwuu)
ig.opt_reddish: Ucha Uhie ma ọ bụ Odo-odo (Nwere ígwè dị ukwuu)
ig.opt_light: Ucha Ọcha ma ọ bụ Nzu (Nri adịghị na ya nke ukwuu)
ig.opt_fast: Mmiri na-agba ọsọ (Ala na-akpọnwụ ngwa ngwa)
ig.opt_moderate: Dị mma (Mmiri dị na ya ma na-agbapụta)
ig.section_prices_desc: Ọnụ ahịa ihe ọkụkụ gị si n'ahịa Nigeria dị iche iche iji nyere gị aka nweta ezigbo uru.
ig.section_ussd_desc: Ọtụtụ ndị ọrụ ugbo na-eji ekwentị nta. Nwaa otú ha na Seedorra si kparịta ụka site na USSD na SMS n'ekwentị simulator a.
ig.ussd_dial_inst: Tẹ pịa USSD ka ị banye na menu ekwentị simulator:
ig.admin_desc: Gbanwee ederede na foto ndị dị na weebụsaịtị gị ebe a.
ig.admin_upload_inst: Bulite foto ọhụrụ site na kọmputa gị:

pcm.hero_title: Better Farm Advice for Naija Farmers
pcm.hero_subtitle: Get AI crop advice, best time to plant, and weather alert updates for your own local language.
pcm.section_weather_desc: No let bad weather surprise you. Get live updates on rain, dry spell, and temp for your farm area.
pcm.section_crop_desc: Select your state and season make AI tell you the best crop to plant to get plenty gain.
pcm.section_calendar_desc: Find the correct weeks to plant your crops make you for no lose your seeds.
pcm.section_yield_desc: Calculate how many bags (50kg) of food you fit harvest based on the size of your farm land.
pcm.section_soil_desc: Answer small questions about your soil make we give you cheap organic ways to cure the ground.
pcm.opt_dark: Dark Brown or Black (Ground rich well)
pcm.opt_reddish: Red or Yellow (Iron plenty, organic low)
pcm.opt_light: Light Gray (Organic low, food no plenty inside)
pcm.opt_fast: Fast drainage (It dey dry very fast)
pcm.opt_moderate: Moderate (It hold water small and drain well)
pcm.section_prices_desc: Naija market prices scraped live make middleman no cheat you when you sell.
pcm.section_ussd_desc: Plenty farmers no get smartphone. Test how they dey use Seedorra offline with USSD code and SMS alerts.
pcm.ussd_dial_inst: Click the button to dial Seedorra code for simulator screen:
pcm.admin_desc: Change website text or upload files direct from your computer.
pcm.admin_upload_inst: Upload new image from your system:
